titleStmt.title: SII 20.104: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 104. (B.K. No. 74 of 1936-37.) MALGHĀṆ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the front wall of Teggina dēgula.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 8, Pramādi, Śrāvaṇa, Amāvāsye, Solar eclipse, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1133, August 2. The weekday was, however, Wednesday.

The inscription records a gift of land and also income from taxes to god Svayaṁbhūdēva of the agrahāra village Mallagāṇa for worship and offerings, by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kumāra Sōvarasa of the Śiḷāra family, for the merit of his father Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siṅgarasa, who was the subordinate of the king's father Tribhuvanamalladēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ tagaranagarādhīśvaranudā
ramahēśvaraṁ baṁgāṟabhērīnirghōṣa
ṇaṁ samaraikabhīṣaṇaṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ
dāyādyakauravabaḷakapidhvajaṁ śiḷāṟavaṁ
śōdbhavaṁ vibhavādharīkritapurūravaṁ jīmū
tavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ sauryyaraghujātaṁ
boṭṭineṟega śiḷāgirivajradaṁḍa kadanapracaṇḍaṁ vi
dagdhamugdhāṁganāhridayakusmakōdaṁḍa(ṁ) nude
ganankakāṟaṁ raṇaraṁgadhīra kētaladēviya
gandhavāraṇaṁ ripumadanivāraṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanama
lladēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmā
disamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
siṁgarasargge parōkṣavinayamuṁ
śrēyasvavāgi magaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara ku
māraṁ sōvarasaru svasti śrīmaccāḷu
kyabhūlōkavarṣa 8 neya pramādi saṁ
vaccharada śrāvaṇadamāvāsye sūryyagra
haṇa sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmatsarvvana
maśyadagrahāraṁ mallagāṇada śrīsvayaṁ
bhudēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nē vēdyakkaṁSome space is left after this letter.
Alli tavage naḍava manneyada nibandhada honnoḷa
ge varṣaṁprati mūṟugadyāṇa ponnanācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salvantāgi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi
kālaṁ karcci biṭṭarī dharmmamaṁ Ārādaḍaṁ pratipāḷi
suvaru yōgakṣēmamaṁ Uroḍeyaruṁ mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ
nōḍuvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharā ṣaṣṭirvvaraṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ mattaṁ maṁḍaḷēśvara kumāraṁ sōvarasaru srī svayaṁbhudēvargge
siṁdigeya baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍa mallagāṇada sīmeyiṁ teṁka maṁgaḷūra pa
ḍuvaṇa holadalu dēvarige biṭṭa māṇikēsvara ma 20 .
gāṇa 1 va naḍasu[varu .] .
Digital edition of SII 20.104 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
